title: Bioavailability
text: Bioavailability is the fraction of a dose that reaches systemic circulation unchanged.

title: Volume of Distribution
text: A large Vd suggests extensive tissue distribution rather than confinement to plasma.

title: Clearance
text: Clearance describes the volume of plasma cleared of drug per unit time.

title: Half-life
text: Half-life helps estimate time to steady state and time needed for drug elimination.

title: Steady State
text: Most drugs reach near steady state after about 4 to 5 half-lives.

title: Agonist
text: An agonist activates a receptor and produces a biological response.

title: Antagonist
text: An antagonist binds a receptor but blocks activation by an agonist.

title: Therapeutic Index
text: A narrow therapeutic index drug needs closer monitoring because small dose changes may cause toxicity.

title: Adherence
text: Before declaring treatment failure, always consider adherence, technique, interactions, and dose adequacy.

title: Renal Function
text: Reduced renal function can increase exposure to renally eliminated drugs.

title: Pregnancy Warning
text: ACE inhibitors and ARBs are generally avoided in pregnancy due to fetal risk.

title: Beta Blockers
text: Abrupt beta blocker withdrawal may cause rebound tachycardia or hypertension.

title: QT Prolongation
text: Combining multiple QT-prolonging drugs can increase arrhythmia risk.

title: Dose Check
text: Always check units before calculating dose: mg, mcg, mL, kg, and concentration must match.

title: Enzyme Induction
text: Enzyme induction usually lowers concentrations of substrate drugs over days to weeks.

title: Enzyme Inhibition
text: Enzyme inhibition may raise substrate drug levels more quickly than induction.

title: Asthma
text: Short-acting beta agonists provide quick relief but do not replace controller therapy in persistent asthma.

title: NSAIDs
text: NSAIDs may worsen blood pressure control, kidney function, and GI bleeding risk in susceptible patients.

title: Loading Dose
text: Loading dose depends mainly on target concentration and volume of distribution.

title: Maintenance Dose
text: Maintenance dose is strongly influenced by clearance and dosing interval.

title: High-Yield Reminder 21
text: Review mechanism, major adverse effects, monitoring, interactions, and counseling points before exam practice.
